programs.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programs.desc: Eivin and August make a unique hay baler that will ease their load if it doesn't set them on fire! And, the family go salmon fishing at the Copper River. S9 E9.

programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: A pair of homesteaders and their livestock are mired in muddy clay in the East Georgia woods. The Raneys must fix it before the next big rains.

programs.title: The Good Doctor
programs.desc: Salen takes extreme measures when she learns that the surgical staff have joined Lim's efforts against her; the team treats a liver transplant patient whose organ donor unwittingly gave him cancer.

programs.title: Pretty Little Liars
programs.desc: With Alison leading them down a dangerous path and 'A' barring them from telling the police the truth, Aria, Emily, Hanna and Spencer feel trapped and are desperate to find a way out of this mess.
